headline: HII Names Michael DeBernardis Vice President and Chief Counsel of Mission Technologies
summary: McLEAN, Va., July 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced that Michael DeBernardis has joined the company as vice president and chief counsel for its Mission Technologies division, HII’s global all-domain national security solutions business. In this role, DeBernardis will advise senior leadership and lead the delivery of legal services for Mission Technologies. He will serve as a key member of the division’s leadership team, supporting its continued growth across defense, intelli
